productDisplayName: FILA Men Aruba Navy Blue Sandal
description: A perfect semi-casual footwear, fila Aruba sandals are a great addition to your wardrobe.UpperSynthetic leather straps with padded fabric inner lining for absolute comfortVelcro closures on the forefoot, midfoot and back heel straps to customise the FitTextured PU padded footbed with ergonomic grooves for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesCurved midfoot for inner arch supportshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
